## Reproduce in the docs playground first

Go to [sds-motion-forge.netlify.app](https://sds-motion-forge.netlify.app), find the effect, open its modal, and use the copy-paste snippet. If the bug reproduces there, paste that snippet below.

**Does the bug reproduce in the docs playground?**
- [ ] Yes — paste the exact snippet below
- [ ] No — the bug is specific to my project (include integration details below)
